content: We can reframe naturally occurring biological pathogens (biological agents defined in Topic B) as evolutionary analogs of 2025 ICM curiosity-driven autonomous UAV swarm agents, where both drive their own propagation and adaptive behavior via intrinsic reward for novel, uncharted territory. This draws a direct parallel between the intrinsic curiosity reward that drives ICM agents to explore unknown environments and the evolutionary fitness reward that drives biological agents to seek out new unexploited host niches.
